story.text: The bank has two poles, both derived, never hand-asserted. Exemplars (good, to share and emulate) are derived by folding over agents' impacts and efforts at gateways — so exemplar != landing, and the stalled arcs (27 pieces of effort) are NOT exemplar-dark (this resolves the cold-start). Notorieties (bad) are derived from witnessed violation of policy and priors. The negative pole GENERATES exemplar definitions by inversion (the grip discipline: the non-example defines the example), and the violation stream re-derives the definition (freshness — never frozen). Boogeyman lifecycle, star-chamber-proof by category: named-before-proof = untidiness (soft: surface and inspect, never detain — a 'ghost accusation'); witnessed violation = hard notoriety (licenses reversible quarantine); rehabilitated/dissolved = superseded or cleaned. The definitions of exemplar AND boogeyman are themselves versioned, refusable, gated atoms. Value: the system learns what good and bad are from its own evidence, without minting fakes or detaining on a vibe.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
